# GitHub Copilot Instructions

The canonical, up-to-date instructions for this repository live in
**[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)** (single source of truth).

GitHub Copilot reads `AGENTS.md` natively; this file is kept only as a pointer
so the guidance is discoverable from `.github/`. **Do not edit this file** —
make all changes in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).
